ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "matchday" INTEGER /* Matchday number indicating the match week */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team */,
  "away_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team */,
  "full_time_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (H for home win, A for away win, D for draw) */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "match_location" TEXT /* Specific location of the match (e.g., city, stadium) */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who officiated the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match (e.g., sunny, rainy) */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., completed, postponed, abandoned) */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "match_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team participates */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current manager */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary colors of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league FOREIGN KEY ("league") REFERENCES leagues ("league_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "league_website" TEXT /* URL of the league's official website */,
  "league_logo" TEXT /* URL of the league's logo */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "promotion_spots" INTEGER /* Number of promotion spots to higher leagues */,
  "relegation_spots" INTEGER /* Number of relegation spots to lower leagues */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match associated with the result */,
  "home_goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the home team */,
  "away_goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the away team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Final result of the match */,
  "half_time_home_goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the home team at half time */,
  "half_time_away_goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the away team at half time */,
  "first_half_result" TEXT /* Result of the first half (H, A, D) */,
  "second_half_result" TEXT /* Result of the second half (H, A, D) */,
  "penalties_home" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the home team in penalties (if applicable) */,
  "penalties_away" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the away team in penalties (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot (left, right) */,
  "contract_expiry" TEXT /* Expiry date of the player's contract */,
  "player_photo" TEXT /* URL of the player's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the referee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the referee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the referee */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "referee_photo" TEXT /* URL of the referee's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the manager */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the manager */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "manager_photo" TEXT /* URL of the manager's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (goal, yellow card, red card, substitution) */,
  "event_time" INTEGER /* Time of the event in minutes */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played by the player */,
  "cards" TEXT /* Number and type of cards received (e.g., Y for yellow, R for red) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "possession" REAL /* Percentage of possession */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots off target */,
  "corners" INTEGER /* Number of corners */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
